search.refreshing: 正在重新整理搜尋索引……
search.noMatches: 沒有找到 "{query}" 的匹配項。
search.hint: 輸入以搜尋頁面、容器、代理、觸發器、監視器和設定。

connection.lostMessage: 伺服器無法存取。正在等待其重新上線……
connection.restartingMessage: Drydock 正在重新啟動{opId}。服務恢復後將重新連線……

banners.legacyConfigTitleSingular: 偵測到 {total} 個舊配置別名
banners.legacyConfigTitlePlural: 偵測到 {total} 個舊配置別名
banners.legacyApiPathTitle: {total} requests to the removed API path detected
banners.oidcHttpTitle: 偵測到 HTTP OIDC 發現
banners.curlHealthcheckTitle: 偵測到自訂 curl 健康檢查覆蓋
banners.oidcHttpBody: One or more OIDC providers use an insecure {httpCode} discovery URL. HTTP discovery is deprecated and will be removed in v1.6.0. Update your Identity Provider to serve its discovery endpoint over {httpsCode}, then update the {discoveryEnv} environment variable to match.
banners.legacyHashBody: Your basic authentication uses a legacy password hash format. Legacy v1.3.9 formats are deprecated and will be removed in v1.6.0. Re-hash your admin password with {argon} (see the migration guide for the one-liner).
banners.legacyConfigBody: Deprecated configuration aliases are in use. Rename {wudEnv} env vars to {ddEnv} and {wudLabel} Docker labels to {ddLabel}. {triggerEnv} variables should also migrate to {actionEnv} or {notificationEnv} (see the migration guide for the full rename map).
banners.legacyApiBody: Clients on this instance recently called the removed unversioned {oldPrefix} path and are receiving {statusCode} errors. Migrate them to the {v1Prefix} prefix. WUD-era integrations like wud-card or Homepage's whatsupdocker widget can set {compatFlag} instead of migrating.
banners.curlHealthcheckBody: Your Drydock container uses a custom curl-based healthcheck override. curl remains available for backward compatibility in v1.5.x and v1.6.x; v1.6.0 is the final warning release, and curl will be removed from the image in v1.7.0. Prefer the built-in image healthcheck, or update your override to {bin}.
